title: TW’s Decoration Extension
description: Decoration mod based on decorative food.Not purely decorative!
body:
# Tw's Decoration Extension

![background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2FGjgUh1/images/f2072922792ae0fa018f824514b78e7d27346e96_350.webp)

**Tw's Decoration Extension** adds a variety of decorative blocks and entities to enrich your Minecraft builds, along with a few small gameplay tweaks. 

It requires the **[TW's Decorative Food](https://modrinth.com/mod/tws-decorative-food)** mod as a dependency.

---

## Features

### Picnic Baskets
- 16 dyeable variants (matching all wool colors) and a plain one.
- Right-click to open/close the lid (sneak + click to toggle without interaction).
- Store **one type of food/item** inside (max stack size varies per item).
- Place or take out items when the basket is open.
- **Sneak + click** on a colored basket to remove the dyed carpet and revert to a plain basket.

### Chairs
- Craftable chairs in all wood types: oak, spruce, birch, jungle, acacia, dark oak, cherry, and bamboo.

### Hanging Hooks (Rack Hooks)
- Two variants: iron and copper.
- Hang items on **four separate slots** per block.
- Some items (like salmon) require **two blocks of vertical space** – the hook checks below for air.

### Simple Hooks
- A smaller hook that hangs from a chain.
- Holds **one item** from a predefined list (raw/cooked meats, fish).
- Place a chain above, then attach the hook to the bottom of the chain.

### Chicken Egg Placement
- Chickens no longer just drop eggs – they **place eggs as decorative food blocks** (provided by TW's Decorative Food)!
- Eggs will stack onto existing egg blocks nearby, up to the block's max stack size.
- If no egg block is nearby, the chicken attempts to place a new egg block on a suitable surface.

---

## Dependencies
- **[TW's Decorative Food](https://modrinth.com/mod/tws-decorative-food)** (required)

---

## 💬 Feedback & Suggestions
If you encounter any issues or have ideas for improvement, please report them on our [GitHub Issues page](https://github.com/666daji/Decoration-Extension/issues).
